title: Supply Chain Manager - AirAsia Cargo India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - AirAsia Cargo India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the AirAsia Cargo India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AirAsia Cargo India:
AirAsia Cargo India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia Cargo India!
